name: styleflow-bd-boutique-agent
description: Business-specific LangChain sales and inventory agent for a fictional Bangladeshi Facebook clothing boutique.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/agent/agent.js && node --check src/agent/memory.js && node --check src/agent/tools/calculator.js && node --check src/agent/tools/catalogue.js && node --check src/agent/tools/inventory.js && node --check src/agent/tools/storePolicy.js && node --check src/agent/tools/humanHandoff.js && node --check src/routes/chat.js
